items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.raw_content: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普告知国会，因停火协议存在，对伊朗的敌对行动已终止，因此无需国会授权。

items.title: The Papers:  'Burnham plans to return' and 'Four weeks from crunch'
items.raw_content: Labour grandee Andy Burnham "plans to return to Westminster" and oil crunch looms lead Saturday's papers.
items.ai_summary: 英国工党资深人士安迪·伯纳姆计划重返威斯敏斯特，石油危机临近成为报纸头条。

items.title: Peter Kay show evacuated and man held after police investigate 'suspicious bag'
items.raw_content: A 19-year-old man is in custody and the Birmingham site has been searched.
items.ai_summary: 彼得·凯的演出因可疑包裹被疏散，一名19岁男子被拘留。

items.title: US court limits mail-order access to abortion pill mifepristone
items.raw_content: The court decision curbs access to the drug used in medication abortions, which is currently the most common method for the procedure in the US.
items.ai_summary: 美国法院限制通过邮寄获取堕胎药米非司酮，此举将影响药物流产这一最常见的堕胎方式。

items.title: Boats, dancing and cake-cutting: Bermuda welcomes King Charles
items.raw_content: Schoolchildren turn out to meet the monarch, with exotic birds and Bob Marley music all part of the welcome.
items.ai_summary: 百慕大以游船、舞蹈和切蛋糕仪式欢迎查尔斯国王到访，学校儿童、 exotic鸟类和鲍勃·马利音乐成为欢迎活动亮点。

items.title: Trump claims other presidents flouted war powers law. It's a mixed record
items.raw_content: Both Bushes and Reagan won authorisation for wars, but Obama and Clinton ducked the requirement.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普声称其他总统违反战争权力法，但历史记录显示情况不一，部分总统获得授权，部分未遵循。

items.title: BBC tracking US warships using blurry pixels and AI
items.raw_content: The BBC Verify team built an AI model to track US aircraft carrier Abraham Lincoln.
items.ai_summary: BBC验证团队利用模糊像素和AI模型追踪美国航母亚伯拉罕·林肯号。

items.title: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.raw_content: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.ai_summary: 奥斯卡奖主办方宣布，使用人工智能创作的演员或编剧将无法获得奖项。

items.title: Mortgages, jobs and energy bills - how the Iran war will affect your money
items.raw_content: The Bank of England's latest report reveals some interesting details on how our finances will be affected due to the Iran war.
items.ai_summary: 英格兰银行报告指出，伊朗战争将影响抵押贷款、就业和能源账单等个人财务。

items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.raw_content: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
items.ai_summary: 美国计划将驻德美军削减5000人，此举正值美国与德国因伊朗问题发生争执。
